question: Will Donald Trump announce a new cabinet member before 1 July 2026?
reason: Recent reports indicate potential Cabinet changes, but no official announcements have been made.
evidence: On April 3, 2026, The Washington Post reported that President Trump is considering further Cabinet changes, including positions held by Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick and Labor Secretary Lori Chavez-DeRemer. ([washingtonpost.com](https://www.washingtonpost.com/politics/2026/04/03/trump-cabinet-lutnick-deremer-blanche-bondi/?utm_source=openai))
As of May 27, 2026, no official announcements have been made regarding new Cabinet appointments.
searchQueries: Donald Trump new cabinet member announcement 2026
